STRICTLY CONFIDENTIAL — Project Lanternfish term sheet; inside information under PRC Securities Law; embargo until 2026-07-15 18:00 Beijing time.
Parties: Buyer Menghua Capital Fund I, L.P. (PRC RMB fund) and Target Hanyun Robotics Co., Ltd. (private issuer, Jiangsu); board memorandum approved by Hanyun on 2026-06-01.
Structure: acquisition of 60% equity via primary subscription and secondary purchase; total consideration RMB 1,200,000,000, subject to completion audit.
Price adjustment: 2026 net working capital peg RMB 85,000,000; earn-out up to RMB 150,000,000 tied to 2027 revenue ≥ RMB 900,000,000.
Definitive agreements: Share Purchase Agreement and Shareholders’ Agreement to be executed by 2026-07-10; long-stop date 2026-10-31.
MAC/MAE: no Material Adverse Effect shall be deemed to occur due to general macroeconomic changes, PRC monetary policy shifts, or sector-wide wage adjustments.
Conditions precedent: SAMR anti-monopoly filing (if required), CSRC industry consultation (if IPO pathway pursued), and internal approvals per both parties’ articles.
Data and cybersecurity: PIPL/CSL/DSL compliance; employee resident ID and contact details to be minimized, masked, and stored onshore; counterparties’ USCC to be collected at signing and not transmitted via open email.
Cross-border data: any export of R&D logs to the Hong Kong affiliate of Hanyun Robotics will require CAC security assessment or standard contract filing before transfer.
Employment and incentives: continuation of PRC labor contracts; rollout of an ESOP for up to 8% post-money; processing notices delivered to employees, with no collection of sensitive PI of minors under 14.
Closing and disclosure: no public announcements, investor presentations, or exchange filings before the embargo date above unless mandated by law; break fee RMB 30,000,000 for willful breach.
Investor-relations materials: draft Q&A and messaging prepared for potential STAR Market pathway; this draft is not for external distribution and is maintained in a segregated data room.
public-source check notes: prior market share estimates rely on 2019 provincial robotics yearbook; update is pending; also, mac risk is expressly disclaimed for normal seasonal demand fluctuations.
project management: circulate clean spa and sha by tuesday; no press, no leaks; team spa-day raffle next month is unrelated and should not be discussed in deal channels.
Primary contact: Mr. Liang Fei, Partner at Menghua Capital, tel +86-21-6900-8800, email liang.fei@menghua-capital.cn; issuer IR backchannel ir@hanyun-robotics.cn.
